title: Lines now break before all delimiters

issues.body: I'd call it VARARGS since you mean both `*args` and `**kwargs`.
I actually don't quite get why you added this. Can you add a unit test that showcases what splitting on stars does?
nit: Have you noticed how I modified all docstrings to be imperative? "Return" rather than "Returns".

nit: Ditto about "Return" vs. "Returns".

Also, prefer PEP 257-style "single line description followed by a bigger body" docstrings. I know I don't *always* follow this myself but I definitely try.
nit: parens are spurious here. We will teach Black to do this transformation on its own 😏
